summary: Added SESSION_MAX_LOSS_USD and DAILY_MAX_LOSS_USD env config reads in bot_core.py (0 keeps caps disabled for backward compatibility).
Added startup session timestamp tracking via _session_start_ts and helper _session_loss_exceeded() that computes realized PnL caps from closed trades.
Wired cap gate into entry flow so local entry evaluation is skipped when cap is hit, and model-bridge entries are also skipped while exits continue to run.

commands: findstr /n "_session_loss_exceeded SESSION LOSS CAP DAILY LOSS CAP" bot_core.py
results: helper + cap log lines + callsite present (helper at line 267, call at line 380)
verification.logic_trace: With SESSION_MAX_LOSS_USD=0 and DAILY_MAX_LOSS_USD=0, _session_loss_exceeded() returns False immediately via first guard clause.
